message:
chore(deps): bump fsqlite-parser → hashbrown 0.14.5 in lockfile

Downstream Cargo.lock refresh from the fsqlite-parser change that
swapped std::collections::HashSet for hashbrown::HashSet in the SQL
lexer (frankensqlite commit a384e848). No source change in this
repo — the path-dependency on fsqlite-parser now pulls hashbrown
0.14.5 as a transitive crate, so the generated lockfile records
the new edge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
